title: TDDL Reader Schema
description: TDDL reader configuration for DataWorks Data Integration

column.description: Column names to read from the table

appName.description: TDDL application name, used to identify the TDDL database application instance

guid.description: Global unique identifier for data asset, format: tddl.<appName>.<tableName>

checkSlave.description: Whether to check slave delay before reading. When true, automatically switches to master if slave delay exceeds slaveDelayLimit

slaveDelayLimit.description: Slave delay threshold in seconds. When checkSlave is true and slave delay exceeds this value, automatically switches to master

masterSlave.description: Master-slave read strategy: master (read from master only), slave (prefer slave), only_slave (read from slave only)

where.description: SQL WHERE clause for filtering data
